## "Are We Winning 99%?"

**NO. The exact verified number is 0.0% win rate on 0 trades.**

- There are zero trades in any replay, evaluation, or live run.
- Win rate is undefined (0/0). The system reports 0.0%.
- 99% is **not supported by any evidence** in the repository.
- No claim of win rate can be made without actual trades.
- The system is currently too conservative to enter any trades on the available data.
- Statistical significance requires ≥30 trades minimum. We have 0.
